body_txt: When Only Smart People May Pass , a challenge is often given in the form of a Riddle . The solution to said riddle is often, in itself, the means by which the characters may continue. (Unless the characters are Genre Savvy , in which case it may turn into Only the Knowledgable May Pass .) This sort of riddle game is sometimes also used for other purposes than determining whether someone may pass. For example, it may be for a reward of an item or information. Sub Tropes include Riddling Sphinx (the tendency of sphinxes to do this), Riddle of the Sphinx (a particular riddle that's very popular) and These Questions Three... (combining this trope with the Rule of Three ). See also the sister trope Life-or-Death Question , which is when the same trope is simply a question (or multiple questions) and not a riddle, and Deadly Game of Chance , when the game relies on luck. No relation to the comedy podcast Answer Me This .
